title: cleistes fragrans
intro: Cleistes fragrans, also known as the Fragrant Pink Pogonia, is a type of orchid that belongs to the Asclepiadaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues and inflammation, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Cleistes fragrans include relieving coughs and colds, soothing sore throats, and reducing fever. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
